collection: CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S
description: Several fragments from a legal document in Judaeo-Arabic. Concerning Abū Saʿd b. Hassūn known as Ibn al-Wuḥsha (i.e., the son of the well-known businesswoman). Dating: first half of the 12th century. Also concerns Abū l-Ḥusayn al-Ḥalabī al-Ṣayrafī and his shop; a certain Abū l-ʿAlāʾ; a partnership (muʿāmala); a condition about a fine of 10 dinars to be paid to the qodesh in case of separation (which may have in fact taken place); and someone, probably Ibn al-Wuḥsha, violating an oath (ואחנת אלשבועה). One of the torn fragments, T-S AS 146.296, was later reused for jottings on verso in a rudimentary hand. (Information in part from CUDL.) Joins: Alan Elbaum.
description_he: מספר שברים ממסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית, עוסקים באבו סעד ב' חסון הידוע כאבן אל-וחשה (בן האשה המפורסמת). מהמחצית הראשונה של המאה ה-12. עוסק בשותפות, חנות ותנאי קנס של 10 דינרים לקודש במקרה של פרידה.
